content.en:
The leader of this group of Blood Kun is the Lord of Quantum.

At this time, he stared at the boundary gap of the territorial sea and said, "That bone transformation realm creature should be a creature of this special world, and you can't enter it without knowing this world." "

"Examine the person and the rules of this world. "

Lord Quantum said.

"Hmm!"

The other Blood Kun Clan Bone Transformation Realm nodded slightly.

Subsequently.

They started to detect it.

There are many special worlds in the land of the Eternal Shore, and places like the Territorial Sea Boundary Seam also belong to a special world in their eyes, and there is no difference.

Soon, the test results came in.

"Lord Quantum, the test shows that the internal void of this world is very large, far surpassing that of other worlds, and the personality has also reached the standard of the sixth-level world! The suppression of the outer world has reached the seventh-level. "

A bone metamorphosis said.

"The inner void is very large, it should belong to the multi-void world, and it is also more common in the land of eternity!"

The Lord of Quantum muttered.

The multi-void world is also the mainstream of the land beyond eternity.

Like many cultivators and Blood Transformation Realm races, they all came out of the Void World and gradually took root in the land of eternity.

The multi-void world of the sixth-level world is not very powerful, and it belongs to the Heavenly Ancestor who can give birth to the Bone Transformation Realm, but it is difficult to give birth to a powerful Bone Transformation Realm.

The only trouble for them is that the suppression has reached level seven.

Seventh-level suppression, after they enter this multi-void world, their strength will be suppressed a lot, and the higher their cultivation, the greater the suppression.

For example, he is a boundary-breaking genius of the seventh-time bone transformation realm, and once he enters this multi-void world, his strength will be suppressed to a boundary-breaking genius who only has five bone transformations.

In this way, he couldn't even defeat the Lord of the Ruins of the Six Bone Transformation Realm.

If they enter the bone transformation realm, they will all have to be sent to death!

However, let them let the Lord of the Ruins go, that is impossible.

"Then let the clan send a clansman to bring the Eternal Boundary Pillar!"

Quantum decided.

The Eternal Boundary Pillar is a very important treasure that can be brought into a special world to freeze the Origin Void, allowing them to exert their full strength, but time cannot last long.

The sixth-level multi-void world can just be at the level of being suppressed.

If the person of the boundary gap in the territorial waters rises to another level, they really can't help it!

After the notification, the Lord of Quantum waited here.

Time passes slowly.

Seeing that the Blood Kun Clan had not yet entered, the Lord of the Ruins thought that the Blood Kun Clan had given up, so he breathed a sigh of relief.

Subsequently.

He wasn't worried.

Then, he learned about the situation in the boundary rift of territorial waters.

"What about the Lord of the True Dragon?"

The Lord of the Ruins asked about the Bone Transformation Realm of the Cave of the Ruins.

At this time, a bone transformation realm said: "The Lord of the Ruins, the Lord of the True Dragon, and the True Dragon Cave Heaven are all gone, and they have been destroyed by the Lord of Endless!"

"Endless Lord???" The Lord of the Ruins is confused, the Endless Lord still has the strength to destroy the True Dragon Cave Heaven?

How is this possible?

Subsequently.

This Bone Transformation Realm gave a general explanation of the situation, which made the Lord of the Ruins completely shocked.

"The Lord of Endless has also entered the land of the Eternal Shore, and it is mixed very well, cultivating a large number of bone transformation realms for the entire human race???" The Lord of the Ruins was shocked.

"Yes!" the bone transformation realm nodded, "As for how many bone transformation realms have been born in the human race, I don't know, and I don't dare to enter the Wanlong territorial sea to investigate!"

"In the land of eternity, it is not difficult to break through the Blood Transformation Realm to the Bone Transformation Realm, but the price to pay for letting so many Blood Transformation Realms break through to the Bone Transformation Realm is not small. The wealth of the Infinity Lord is truly amazing!"

The Lord of the Ruins muttered.

He didn't have the idea of seizing the wealth of the Endless Lord, after all, Ye Tian, who had such resources, couldn't be weak now!

He is not stupid, so naturally he will not offend the Lord of Endless.

Subsequently.

He began to heal.

This time, he was not lightly injured, so he wanted to recover from his injuries as soon as possible.

Years passed, after some time.

The Lord of the Ruins has almost recovered from his injuries.

But at this moment, the entire territorial sea boundary seemed to shake.

Click!!!

In an area not very far from the Chaos Cave, the barrier of the territorial sea boundary crack was broken open, and a pillar of heaven stood directly in the impact flow, so that the impact force of the territorial sea boundary crack instantly shattered and stagnated, so that everything around it was nothing, and all the rules were reversed.

The Lord of the Ruins naturally noticed the situation here for the first time, and his face suddenly changed.

He thought of the Blood Kun Clan!

The Blood Kun Clan did not give up, but had been preparing for the invasion, and now they have brought the things of the invasion.

He didn't know the pillar, but this thing would definitely be against him.

Click!!!!

One by one, figures came in from the land of eternity, and walked into the boundary of the territorial waters.

The point is that their cultivation has not been suppressed, and each of them exudes an incomparably powerful aura.

"This pillar ......"

The Lord of the Ruins finally knew what the purpose of this pillar was, and it turned out to be that the Lord of Quantum could directly exert their full strength.

"It's over!"

He wanted to keep running away.

But what can be imagined is that outside the seam of the territorial sea boundary, there must be the bone transformation realm of the blood kun clan guarding it.

The point is, it's not easy for him to leave the territorial waters now!

That formation passage was destroyed by him, and it was difficult for him to break through the barrier of the territorial sea boundary gap himself.

He did know that there was a treasure, the Eternal Shuttle, which could easily enter and exit the boundary of territorial waters, but the price was a bit expensive, so he didn't buy it.

So, he can't escape now.

Bang!!!!!

Those Bone Transformation Realms of the Blood Kun Clan moved with the Eternal Boundary Pillar, and then began to search for the Lord of the Ruins.

Through special secret techniques, the Lord of the Ruins cannot hide under close exploration.

"There it is!"

The group of Blood Kun Clan tracked down the Lord of the Ruins.

The Lord of the Ruins knows very well that the Cave of the Ruins cannot protect him.

At this time, he thought of Ye Tian, so he just headed towards the territorial waters of Wanlong for the first time.

In case Ye Tian's strength is very strong, maybe he can use Ye Tian's strength to block this group of blood kun clans!

Whew!!!

This group of blood kun clans is very fast, but because they don't know the situation in the territorial sea boundary and are afraid that it is very powerful here, they are very careful.

But.

When they caught some creatures and absorbed their memories, they knew that the boundary gap in the territorial sea was very weak, and they were immediately relieved.

"Hahaha, this world is called the Territorial Sea Boundary Sea, it is indeed very large, countless times larger than many Void Worlds, that is, there are fewer resources, but it can be occupied, as a foundation place, and cultivate some clansmen!" said the Lord of Quantum with a smile.

And at this time.

The Lord of the Ruins came to the territorial waters of the Ten Thousand Dragons and begged for help: "Lord of Endless, hurry up and help!"
